metadata.title: QuranMazid — SEO Optimization
metadata.description: Increased organic traffic 5x for QuranMazid through a comprehensive, data-driven SEO strategy using Ahrefs, SEMrush, and Google Search Console.

title: QuranMazid
content: Led a comprehensive SEO overhaul for QuranMazid — from technical audits and Core Web Vitals improvements to strategic content planning and link building. Leveraged Ahrefs, SEMrush, and Google Search Console to achieve a 5x increase in organic traffic and first-page rankings for primary target keywords.
